_regression.source: real capture: Tango caste mix skewed - laborers absorbing slots, servants starved (2026-06)
_regression.note: total population was on target but the MIX was wrong: ~397 laborer (vs ~240), ~21 servant (vs ~120, starved at the end of the pack lists), ~86 merchant (vs ~150). Pins the caste-band rule.
